challenges.title: Greeting Component
challenges.description:
Implement a Greeting component that accepts a `name` prop and renders '

Hello, {name}!

'. Export it as default.

challenges.title: Conditional Rendering
challenges.description:
Implement a UserCard component. If `isLoggedIn` is true render '

Welcome back!

', otherwise render '

Please log in.

'.

challenges.title: List Rendering
challenges.description: Implement a TodoList component that renders an <ul> with an <li> for each string in the `todos` array. Each <li> must use the todo string as its key.

challenges.title: useState Counter
challenges.description: Implement a Counter component with useState. Render the current count and two buttons: 'Decrement' and 'Increment'. Count starts at 0.

challenges.title: Controlled Input
challenges.description:
Implement a NameInput component with a controlled text input. Render '

Hello, {value}!

' below the input. Start with an empty string.

challenges.title: Todo App
challenges.description: Implement a TodoApp with an input + 'Add' button. Clicking Add appends the input value to a list and clears the input. Each todo is rendered as an <li>.

challenges.title: useEffect — Data Fetching
challenges.description:
Implement a UserProfile component. On mount, call fetchUser(userId) and display the returned user's name in a

. Show '

Loading...

' while fetching.

challenges.title: useRef — Focus Management
challenges.description: Implement a FocusInput component. Render an input and a 'Focus' button. Clicking the button focuses the input using a ref.

challenges.title: useContext — Theme
challenges.description: Implement ThemeContext, ThemeProvider (toggles 'light'/'dark'), and a ThemedBox component that reads the context and renders its theme name in a <div>.

challenges.title: Custom Hook — useToggle
challenges.description: Implement a useToggle hook that returns [value, toggle] where toggle() flips the boolean. Then use it in a ToggleButton component.

challenges.title: useMemo — Expensive Computation
challenges.description:
Implement a PrimeList component. Given a `limit` prop, use useMemo to compute all primes up to `limit` and render them as a comma-separated string inside a

.

challenges.title: useCallback — Stable Reference
challenges.description: Implement a SearchBox component. The onSearch callback passed to a memoized child must be stable across re-renders (use useCallback). The child renders a button that calls onSearch with the current query.

challenges.title: useReducer — Shopping Cart
challenges.description: Implement a shopping cart using useReducer. Support ADD_ITEM (adds or increments qty), REMOVE_ITEM (removes), and CLEAR actions. Render total item count.

challenges.title: Error Boundary
challenges.description:
Implement a class-based ErrorBoundary component. If a child throws during render, catch it and display '

Something went wrong.

' instead of crashing.

challenges.title: Custom Hook — useFetch
challenges.description: Implement useFetch<T>(url, fetcher) that returns { data, loading, error }. Fetches on mount and when url changes. fetcher is a dependency-injected function so it can be mocked.

challenges.title: Repository Pattern
challenges.description: Implement IRepository<T, ID> interface and a concrete InMemoryRepository backed by a Map.

challenges.title: Clean Architecture — Use Case
challenges.description: Implement CreateProductUseCase following Clean Architecture. The use case must depend on the IProductRepository interface, never on a concrete class.

challenges.title: Observer — EventBus
challenges.description: Implement an EventBus with on/off/emit that decouples publishers from subscribers.

challenges.title: Strategy Pattern
challenges.description: Implement ISortStrategy<T> interface with AscendingSort and DescendingSort, then a Sorter<T> that delegates to whichever strategy is injected.

challenges.title: Dependency Injection Container
challenges.description: Implement a simple DI Container with register(token, factory) and resolve(token). Factories are called on each resolve (transient — no singleton by default).
